title: Final camera-ask — Which house did YOU like BEST?
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ carved jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat, tiny pumpkin treat bucket. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Ginger: JACK RUSSELL dog, white body with tan ginger patches on head/ears + saddle, tiny PUMPKIN-ORANGE CAPE.

Camera: slow dolly push, eye-level, opening medium-close — matches the closing frame of clip 21 with Sara and Eva still on the couch, blanket draped across Eva and Ginger. Final fourth-wall camera-ask — direct-to-lens engagement payoff.
Scene: @front_house_fall living-room interior — soft beige couch, autumn-orange throw blanket, warm orange floor-lamp glow, paper jack-o-lanterns soft-blurred background.

0:0-0:2 — Slow dolly push, medium-close. @Sara center-left holding a final paper rating card softly with both hands at chest height — five star outlines, all five colored in pink, with a tiny pink heart drawn beside the stars. @Eva center-right with @Ginger softly cradled in the autumn-orange blanket on her lap, Ginger's head softly resting on Eva's forearm.

0:2-0:4 — Slow push in to a soft close-medium on @Sara. @Sara turns softly toward camera, breaks the fourth wall, holds the rating card just slightly forward toward the lens. @Sara, softly to camera: "Which house did YOU like BEST?"
0:4-0:6 — Hold close-medium on @Sara. @Sara, counting softly with kind eyes: "House ONE, TWO, THREE, FOUR, or FIVE? Tell us!"
0:6-0:8 — Slow pan right to @Eva and @Ginger. @Eva softly lifts @Ginger's right front paw with her left hand in a tiny in-place wave toward camera. @Eva, softly to camera: "Ginger says THANK YOU!"
0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to opening medium-close. Both girls turn toward camera with warm shining smiles. @Sara: "Bye!" @Eva: "Bye!" Smash to title card on cut.

Lighting: warm orange floor-lamp glow, soft cozy living-room ambiance, gentle hero-finale warmth.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary. Final fourth-wall engagement payoff.
negativePrompt: red heart that looks like blood
cameraStyle: slow dolly push to medium-close, slow push in to close-medium on Sara for the camera-ask, slow pan right to Eva and Ginger's paw-wave, capped by a slow pull back
closingFrame: Final medium-close at @front_house_fall living room — @Sara center-left holding the all-pink-stars-with-heart rating card softly forward to camera with a warm shining smile; @Eva center-right cradling @Ginger in the autumn-orange blanket, Ginger's right front paw lifted in a tiny wave; both girls beaming directly at the lens; warm orange floor-lamp glow; smash-to-title-card hand-off frame.
